description_long: This is a stylish wristwatch featuring a rose gold-toned metal case and a white dial with matching white strap. The dial is adorned with slim, metallic hour markers and two subdials, giving it a chronograph appearance. The watch has three pushers on the right side, likely for adjusting time and chronograph functions. The strap appears to be made of leather or synthetic material with a smooth finish and a classic buckle closure. The back of the strap is brown, suggesting a comfortable, textured lining. A small, distinct brand logo is visible just below the 12 o'clock position on the dial.
description: A rose gold wristwatch with a white dial, two subdials, and a white leather strap, featuring a visible brand logo and chronograph-style pushers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white dial, rose gold case, two subdials, metallic hour markers, and the brand logo below 12 o'clock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the rose gold case and the three pushers on the right side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the white strap with adjustment holes and the brown inner lining.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the smooth curve of the case and strap, with no visible pushers.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, shield-shaped logo with a crown and text, located just below the 12 o'clock marker on the dial.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is white with slim metallic indices for hour markers, two subdials at the 3 and 9 o'clock positions, and simple, elegant hands. The style is chronograph with a clean, modern look and minimal decorative elements.
attribute_strap_type: White leather strap with a brown inner lining and classic buckle construction.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three hands (hour, minute, second) and two subdials, no visible date window or luminous elements.
